evals.prompt: This project already has a bunch of docs. Ingest everything into the .agents/ system so we have a proper project management setup.
evals.expected_output: Scans project docs, classifies them, creates artifacts with frontmatter (including source: field) preserving original content unmodified, derives statuses, cross-links, populates INDEX.md.

assertions.text: All artifacts have YAML frontmatter with title, status, created
Ingested artifacts have source: field pointing to originals
Some artifacts have links: to other .agents/ artifacts
INDEX.md has entries for all artifacts grouped by directory

evals.prompt: I need to track a new feature idea — we want to add notification preferences so users can control which alerts they get (push, email, in-app). Create a requirement for it.
evals.expected_output: Creates requirements/notification-preferences/ folder with requirement.md containing correct frontmatter (title, status: draft, created date, empty links), content sections (Problem, User Impact, Success Criteria), and updates INDEX.md with an entry under Requirements.

assertions.text: requirement.md exists inside the requirement folder
requirement.md has YAML frontmatter with title, status, created, links
Content has Problem, User Impact, Success Criteria sections
INDEX.md has entry for notification-preferences under Requirements

evals.prompt: The notification preferences requirement looks good, let's write the PRD for it. Users should be able to toggle push, email, and in-app notifications independently per event type (new message, transaction update, review received). Include a quiet hours setting.
evals.expected_output: Adds prd.md to existing requirements/notification-preferences/ folder with correct frontmatter (status: draft), comprehensive product requirements covering the toggle and quiet hours features. Updates INDEX.md.

assertions.text: prd.md has YAML frontmatter with title, status, created, links
PRD has scope, user stories, acceptance criteria sections
PRD covers per-event-type toggles (message, transaction, review)

evals.prompt: Now write the SOW for notification preferences. We're targeting a 3-week timeline. The backend work is estimated at 40 hours and the mobile work at 30 hours. Budget is $15k. The constraint is we need to ship before the next app store release window on June 15th.
evals.expected_output: Adds sow.md to existing requirements/notification-preferences/ folder with correct frontmatter (status: draft), content covering deliverables, timeline, cost, and constraints. References the June 15th deadline and budget figures. Updates INDEX.md.

assertions.text: sow.md has YAML frontmatter with title, status, created, links
SOW mentions June 15th app store deadline constraint
SOW references 40h backend and 30h mobile estimates

evals.prompt: The notification preferences SOW is accepted. Create a plan for it — break it into backend and mobile workstreams. Backend needs to handle preferences storage, API endpoints, and notification filtering. Mobile needs the settings screen, toggle UI, and quiet hours picker.
evals.expected_output: Creates plans/todo/notification-preferences/ folder with plan file containing correct frontmatter (status: todo, links back to requirement and spec if exists), task breakdown with backend and mobile workstreams using ☐ markers. Updates INDEX.md.

assertions.text: Plan .md file exists inside the folder
Plan has YAML frontmatter with title, status, created, links
Task breakdown includes backend tasks (storage, API, filtering)
Task breakdown includes mobile tasks (settings screen, toggles, quiet hours)
INDEX.md has entry for the plan under Plans as todo

evals.prompt: We have a spec and plan ready for the search upgrade. The plan is in-progress and we've been tracking work in the tracker. The search is done now — complete the plan.
evals.expected_output: Prepends tracker to plan file under Execution Log, deletes tracker, sets status completed, moves folder to plans/completed/, updates INDEX.md.

assertions.text: Plan file has tracker content under Execution Log heading
INDEX.md shows completed with new path
